chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-203 of 2023. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For orders on M.A.No.742/2023. 3. For hearing of M.A.No.743/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 19.04.2023 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A. G. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for quashment of FIR Crime No.23/2023, under Section 365-B PPC of P.S Civil Line Jacobabad. It is stated by the Investigating Officer of the said case that he has already submitted interim challan of the case before the Magistrate having jurisdiction and would submit final challan of the case after recording 161 Cr.PC statement of the petitioner subject to her appearance before him. Being satisfied with the statement of the Investigating officer, does not press instant petition. It is disposed of accordingly along with listed applications. Judge Judge
